name: hipaa_asset_risk_features_v1
description: HIPAA-oriented asset risk features (impact, likelihood, risk) derived from dev_assets + control evidence features for technical safeguard monitoring (silver).

hipaa_impact_components.name: hipaa_impact_components
hipaa_impact_components.description: Impact drivers for HIPAA: confidentiality exposure (encryption), regulated scope proxies, and workstation safeguards context.

features.name: hipaa_impact_env_weight
features.description: Impact weight derived from hipaa_asset_environment (prod highest).
features.purpose: Raises impact for assets likely handling regulated workloads (ePHI scope proxies).

features.name: hipaa_impact_encryption_gap_weight
features.description: Impact escalator when disk_encryption_enabled_proxy is false or unknown on endpoints.
features.purpose: Captures higher breach impact risk from lost/stolen endpoints or data-at-rest exposure.

features.name: hipaa_impact_internet_exposure_weight
features.description: Impact weight derived from hipaa_is_internet_exposed_proxy (true increases).
features.purpose: Externally exposed regulated systems increase potential disclosure and breach scope.

features.name: hipaa_raw_impact
features.description: Composite impact score derived from environment, encryption gap, and internet exposure proxies.
features.purpose: Impact component for HIPAA risk equation (Risk = Impact × Likelihood).

hipaa_likelihood_components.name: hipaa_likelihood_components
hipaa_likelihood_components.description: Likelihood drivers for HIPAA: monitoring gaps, missing endpoint protections, misconfig/hardening gaps, exploitable vulns.

features.name: hipaa_likelihood_monitoring_gap
features.description: Likelihood contribution derived from has_agent_installed, agent check-in recency, and health state.
features.purpose: Captures increased compromise probability and reduced audit evidence when telemetry is missing.

features.name: hipaa_likelihood_endpoint_protection_gap
features.description: Likelihood contribution from missing EDR/AV (has_edr_installed, antivirus_present).
features.purpose: Models increased probability of compromise and malware persistence on regulated systems.

features.name: hipaa_likelihood_hardening_gap
features.description: Likelihood contribution from SMB legacy, PowerShell policy risk, secure boot disabled/unknown.
features.purpose: Captures compromise likelihood from hardening drift that impacts confidentiality/integrity.

features.name: hipaa_likelihood_exploitable_vuln
features.description: Likelihood contribution from KEV/exploit signals and severity (has_kev_vuln_open, exploitable_vuln_present, highest_cvss_open).
features.purpose: Escalates likelihood when exploitation evidence exists—important for incident prevention and disclosure risk.

features.name: hipaa_raw_likelihood
features.description: Composite HIPAA likelihood score derived from monitoring gap, endpoint protection gap, hardening gap, and exploitable vulnerability signals.
features.purpose: Likelihood component for HIPAA risk equation (Risk = Impact × Likelihood).

hipaa_risk_metrics.name: hipaa_risk_metrics
hipaa_risk_metrics.description: HIPAA risk computed from impact and likelihood with explainability for safeguards and audit posture.

features.name: hipaa_raw_risk
features.description: HIPAA risk score computed from hipaa_raw_impact × hipaa_raw_likelihood (or calibrated equivalent).
features.purpose: Primary HIPAA decision score for asset-level prioritization and safeguard monitoring (silver).

features.name: hipaa_risk_driver_primary
features.description: Most influential driver among monitoring_gap / endpoint_protection_gap / hardening_gap / exploitable_vuln / encryption_gap.
features.purpose: Explainability feature used for triage routing and compliance evidence narratives.
